name: compose-fixture
comment: Reproduces the ScopeDOPE Compose find-after-type case: OutlinedTextFields in a non-scrollable AlertDialog whose contentDescription sits on a non-focusable android.view.View wrapper. Type into A, then B (the sibling lookup that was failing UiObjectNotFoundException post-type), then C; assert each value reads back. Runs against ComposeFixtureActivity in the bundled host app.

steps.comment: ── the critical step: find fieldB immediately AFTER typing into fieldA (sibling View-wrapper-desc node) ──
